Document:
# CentCommm Roles
CentCommm roles are special ghost roles dispatched directly by Central Command. These roles are [bold]spawned exclusively at admin discretion[/bold] in response to specific in-round events. Do [bold]not[/bold] request or beg for these roles.
All CentCommm roles are [bold]crew-aligned[/bold] unless otherwise noted. You are expected to act professionally and represent Central Command accordingly.
## Emergency Response Team (ERT)
ERT personnel are dispatched to stations experiencing crises beyond the crew's ability to handle. They arrive equipped for their specialization and operate under the ERT Leader's command.
Roles include: Leader, Security, Engineer, Medic, Janitor, and Chaplain.
## CBURN
CBURN (Contained Biological Unit Response) agents are specialized Centcomm operatives trained for containment of biological threats, primarily zombie outbreaks. They arrive with dedicated containment equipment.
## CentCommm Official
A Central Command representative sent to observe or intervene in station affairs. Has authority over station command and acts as a direct extension of CentComm.
